description.text:
*Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) – Full Time and Part Time*

*About Massage Addict*

Massage Addict is 100% Canadian owned and locally operated. With over 125 multi-disciplinary clinics and more than 2,000 Registered Massage Therapists, Chiropractors, Acupuncturists, and Reflexologists across the country, you’ll be part of a premier team that helps over 90,000 Canadians each month manage pain, stress, and anxiety.

At *Massage Addict Marda Loop*, we believe that when therapists are empowered to learn, grow, and thrive, clients receive the best possible care. We are looking for enthusiastic RMTs who are passionate about ongoing education and delivering exceptional clinical outcomes.

*Why Join Our Team?*

We invest in your professional development as much as you do. We offer unmatched access to growth opportunities designed specifically for RMTs:

* *Free Access to Dexterity Online:* Unlimited access to Canada’s premier continuing education platform with over 100 evidence-informed courses.
* *Hands-on, In-Clinic Training:* Participate in live workshops and technique-based courses led by top instructors right in our clinic.
* *Mentorship & Networking:* Gain access to mentorship within a national community of over 2,000 practitioners.
* *A Culture of Excellence:* Work in a collaborative, multi-disciplinary environment built on respect, integrity, and clinical excellence.

*Key Responsibilities*

* *Personalized Care:* Perform various types of massage therapy (Thai, deep tissue, sports, prenatal, cranio, TMJ, etc.) tailored to individual client needs.
* *Clinical Assessment:* Assess clients' physical conditions and discuss preferences to create effective, personalized treatment plans.
* *Documentation:* Keep accurate records of client sessions, including treatment details and progress notes.
* *Patient Education:* Communicate effectively regarding the treatment experience and provide helpful aftercare advice.
* *Professionalism:* Stay updated on industry trends, techniques, and medical terminology. Maintain a clean, organized, and sanitized treatment area.

*What You Can Expect*

We take care of the "business side" so you can focus 100% on your clients' therapeutic needs. We provide:

* *Full Administrative Support:* We handle all booking, billing, invoicing, and *marketing*.
* *Complete Supplies:* All linens, laundry service, and PPE are provided.
* *Premium Space:* Clean, welcoming treatment rooms equipped with *hydraulic tables*.
* *Consistent Volume:* An established and growing client base to ensure predictable income all year round.

*What We Offer*

* *Competitive Compensation* with a predictable income structure.
* *Flexible Scheduling* to support your unique work-life balance.
* *Health Spending Account (HSA)* and optional benefits package.
* *Bonus Perks:* All supplies and CE-approved training provided at no cost to you.

*What You’ll Need to Practice*

* Active membership in good standing with your provincial regulatory college or association.
* Valid Professional Liability Insurance.
* A professional, positive, and passionate outlook with a strong work ethic.
* A dedication to high-quality treatments and a focus on client-centered care.
* A team-player mentality that values collaboration and integrity.

*Ready to Elevate Your Practice?*

We welcome you to take a tour of our clinic, meet the team, and discover why Massage Addict is the right place for your career.

*To Apply:* Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter (optional) outlining your experience to *calgarymardaloop@massageaddict.ca*.

*Join a team that invests in your professional development as much as you do.*

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Permanent, Internship / Co-op

Pay: $45,000.00-$90,000.00 per year

Benefits:
* Company events
* Extended health care
* Flexible schedule
* On-site parking
* Store discount
* Wellness program



Ability to commute/relocate:
* Calgary, AB T2T 1Z1: reliably commute or plan to relocate before starting work (preferred)

Experience:
* Registered Massage Therapist: 1 year (preferred)

Licence/Certification:
* Registered Massage Therapist Certificate (required)

Work Location: In person

description.text:
To meet patient demand, we are looking to expand our team of Registered Massage Therapists in Calgary and surrounding areas.

What you earn (clear and predictable)

$80 for 60-minute sessions
$120 for 90-minute sessions

If you complete 10 or more bookings in the previous month, your rates automatically increase to:

$90 for 60-minute sessions
$130 for 90-minute sessions

There are:

No quotas
No forced availability
No pressure to maintain volume

If one month is slower, your base rate still applies. Consistency is simply rewarded. Many homes also book multiple appointments in the same house, further improving your earning potential.

About ANVITA

ANVITA was built by Massage Therapists, for Massage Therapists.

Like many RMTs, I loved the work, but clinic life slowly caught up with me. Packing my day, skipping breaks, and seeing more patients just to maintain income eventually led to body pain and burnout.

The average career length of an RMT is often quoted as 5 to 8 years. I don't believe it has to be that short. After switching to mobile massage, I realized it was possible to earn well, treat fewer patients, and actually feel good doing this work.

Today, ANVITA supports a growing network of therapists providing in-home care across multiple regions in Canada. ANVITA was built by an RMT and designed around therapist longevity and freedom.

Why Work With ANVITA

Batched appointments to minimize drive time
Bookings, payments, and client communication handled for you
Set your own service radius and booking preferences
Marketing handled for you
Care coordinators available 7 days a week and monitor sessions live
Full control over your schedule
No minimum commitment, try it out with no obligation
Vehicle expenses become tax deductible, helping reduce taxes
Focus on treating patients, not admin

The Lifestyle Difference (What Matters Most)

In a clinic the incentive was always the same, fill the room. Why take a proper lunch when I could book another patient? I had bills, loans, and financial goals, so I pushed. Eventually, it caught up with me. My body hurt. I started dreading work. I could slow down, but that meant a pay cut. Clinic life ties your income to a room. Slow down, take time off, or want flexibility and you pay for it. With mobile, that pressure disappears. The biggest difference was how my body and mind felt doing the work. Mobile practice allows you to design a schedule that supports both your health and your life.

For me:

My time became more valuable
I earned more per session than in a clinic
I took on less hands-on time
I had better energy at the end of the day for my family

Some therapists:

Work 5 to 10 hours a week for supplemental income
Work full time and take as many patients as they like
Take extended time off without worrying about losing a room
Build schedules that support their bodies long term

Full Control, No Pressure

You choose when you work, where you work, how much you work. There is no minimum commitment. Try this alongside your clinic. Try it during a slower season. If it is not for you, you can stop anytime. That freedom is intentional.

Closing

If you love massage therapy but do not want to sacrifice your body, energy, or life to keep doing it, this is worth exploring. We are continuing to expand our care team to meet patient demand while keeping schedules sustainable. ANVITA was built because I wish it existed earlier in my own career.

Requirements

Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) license in regulated provinces (BC, ON, NL, NB, PEI).
In unregulated provinces, completion of a recognized 2,200+ hour massage therapy program and/or active membership in a recognized professional association (e.g., MTAA, MTAM, MTAS, FMQ).

*We’re Hiring – Registered Massage Therapist Wanted! *

Balance Physiotherapy & Massage in Okotoks is looking for a passionate, client-focused *Registered Massage Therapist (RMT)* to join our friendly, multidisciplinary team in our *very busy clinic*.

*Why Join Us:*

* We value *work–life balance* — flexible schedules that fit your lifestyle
* Supportive and collaborative team environment
* Work closely with the *physiotherapist in our clinic* and the physicians’ office in the same building for seamless client care and strong referral connections
* Competitive compensation structure
* Modern, fully equipped *treatment rooms*

*What We’re Looking For:*

* Registered Massage Therapist in good standing with a minimum of *2200 hours of training*
* Strong therapeutic and communication skills
* Ability to work independently while contributing to a team atmosphere
* Commitment to professional development and client-centered care

*About Us:*
At Balance Physiotherapy & Massage, we pride ourselves on personalized, hands-on care in a welcoming and professional environment. Our clinic serves a loyal community who value quality service and a holistic approach to recovery and wellness.

*Location:* Okotoks, AB
*Apply Now:* Send your resume and cover letter to *admin@balanceokotoks.com*

Job Types: Part-time, Commission, Permanent

Pay: $40.00-$70.00 per hour

Benefits:
* Casual dress
* Flexible schedule
* On-site parking

Work Location: In person

* Discounted self-care treatments
* On-site covered parking at a small fee
* Retail & workshops discount

* Casual dress

* Tips

* Current shifts available are Monday (9am to 3:30pm), Tuesday (3pm to 8:30pm), Thursday (3pm to 8:30pm) and Saturdays (3pm to 6pm)

description.text:
We are a busy, well-established chiropractic clinic in the Beltline with over 20 years of an established patient base. Our team includes 3 Chiropractors and 1 RMT, and we are looking for an experienced RMT to take over an existing, active practice.

This is a therapeutic-focused role.

*Why this position stands out*

* Existing caseload (you are not starting from zero)
* Consistent weekday schedule: Mon, Wed, Thurs: 9–5, Friday: 9-4 and closed weekends & stat holidays
* Large treatment room with:
* Electric table
* Sink in-room
* Ample storage
* Casual, professional clinic culture
* Respectful, loyal patient base

*Who we’re looking for*

This role is ideal for an RMT who:

* Has 2+ years of therapeutic/deep tissue/sport/MVA experience

description.text:
*Job Overview*
Riverbend Physiotherapy & Neuro Rehab Clinic is seeking a passionate and motivated *Registered Massage Therapist (RMT)* to join our growing multidisciplinary team.

In this role, you’ll deliver personalized, evidence-based massage therapy treatments while working alongside physiotherapists and other healthcare professionals in a supportive, collaborative environment. If you’re energetic, client-focused, and committed to high-quality care, we’d love to meet you.

*Schedule Requirement:*

* Minimum *3 shifts per week* - Contract

*Responsibilities*

* Provide professional massage therapy treatments tailored to individual client needs
* Perform thorough patient assessments, including symptom review, medical history, and treatment goals
* Deliver treatments such as deep tissue massage, trigger point therapy, and relaxation techniques
* Educate clients on self-care strategies and recommend ongoing treatment plans
* Maintain accurate and timely treatment notes and client records
* Ensure a safe, clean, and comfortable treatment environment following clinic protocols
* Collaborate with physiotherapists and other healthcare providers as needed
* Stay current with best practices and participate in ongoing professional development

Qualifications & Experience

* Registered Massage Therapist with *valid provincial license/certification*
* *At least 1 year of experience*
* Strong knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and relevant medical terminology
* Hands-on experience with a variety of massage techniques (deep tissue, trigger point, etc.)
* Excellent client service and communication skills
* Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced clinical environment
* Experience with pain management and patient assessments preferred
* Familiarity with *Jane App* and *direct billing* is considered an asset, but is not required

Why Join Riverbend?

* Supportive, collaborative multidisciplinary team
* Consistent client flow and administrative support
* Opportunities for professional growth and long-term career development
* Positive, patient-focused work environment

Join *Riverbend Physiotherapy & Neuro Rehab Clinic* and help our clients achieve their wellness and recovery goals through skilled, compassionate care. Your expertise truly makes a difference here.

Benefits:
* On-site parking
* Store discount

Are you a *Registered Massage Therapist* who works from the heart and believes healing is more than just physical?
We’re looking for a practitioner who blends skillful touch with *energy awareness*, intuition, and presence — someone who understands that the body, mind and spirit are deeply connected. *MUST WORK SATURDAYS OR SUNDAYS AND COUPLE OF WEEKDAY EVENINGS. *

Our holistic clinic is a peaceful, community-centered space dedicated to whole-person healing. We value authenticity, compassion, and intuitive care. Our clients come to us not just for relief from pain, but for grounding, restoration and connection.

* Professional liability insurance
* Strong sense of integrity, grounded energy, and compassion

* Beautiful, calming treatment rooms
* Flexible scheduling and fair compensation
* 65/35 split after 6months and 70/30 split after another 6 months

*Genuvis Health*

Genuvis Health, under the leadership of Dr. Sana-Ara Ahmed, is a progressive, multi-modal complex pain clinic dedicated to comprehensive and compassionate patient care. Our integrated care model focuses on innovative problem-solving, evidence-based treatment approaches, and maintaining the highest standards in advanced pain management. We are committed to improving quality of life through collaborative, patient-centred healthcare.

*Position Summary*

We are currently seeking a dedicated and skilled Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) to join our growing team. This role plays a key part in supporting our multidisciplinary approach to complex pain management and overall patient wellness.

*Key Responsibilities*

* Provide therapeutic treatments, including deep tissue massage and trigger point therapy for chronic pain management
* Conduct thorough patient assessments and develop individualized treatment plans
* Collaborate with physicians and healthcare professionals to support integrated care strategies
* Maintain detailed and accurate clinical documentation
* Educate patients on aftercare, rehabilitation, and preventive wellness practices
* Ensure strict adherence to hygiene, safety, and professional standards

*Qualifications*

* Active registration as a Registered Massage Therapist
* Minimum 2,200-hour recognized massage therapy diploma (preferred)
* Experience in deep tissue massage and trigger point therapy
* Strong knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and medical terminology
* Excellent communication and patient care skills
* Understanding of occupational health practices (preferred)
* Medical spa experience is considered an asset

*Why Join Genuvis Health?*

At Genuvis Health, you will be part of a forward-thinking clinical team that values innovation, collaboration, and compassionate care. We foster a supportive environment where practitioners are empowered to grow professionally while making a meaningful difference in patients’ lives.

*Apply Today*

If you are passionate about healing, innovation, and delivering high-quality patient care, we invite you to apply and become part of our mission to create better health together.

description.text:
*Busy. Growing. Fun. And We Actually Care.*

Align Wellness in downtown Cochrane is growing fast and we need another great RMT to join our crew.

We are a busy, high-retention therapeutic clinic with steady new clients coming through the door every week. We invest Google Ads and professional website optimization to stay at the top of searches, which means your schedule builds properly and quickly, not randomly.

Recent therapists have built full schedules within a few months.

If you are motivated, good with people, and want to be part of something that’s gaining real momentum, keep reading.

*The Vibe*

This team of women is strong, supportive, funny, and serious about great care. We celebrate wins. We help each other. We share tips. We show up.

The clinic space is calm, grounded, and beautiful. Natural wood, warm lighting, plants everywhere. It feels good to walk into every day. Clients notice it. Practitioners feel it.

We built this place intentionally.

*What Makes This Different*

We take care of our people.

* Hydraulic tables in every room
* Paid marketing that keeps new clients coming in
* Systems that help you rebook and build retention
* Mentorship on treatment planning and client communication
* Team events and a supportive culture

You focus on being an excellent therapist. We support the rest.

*The Opportunity*

You will:

* Deliver therapeutic, goal-oriented treatments
* Build long-term client relationships
* Learn how to convert first-time bookings into loyal clients
* Grow your confidence and your schedule
* Contribute to a positive, high-standard clinic culture

We care about quality. Clients here want results. That makes the work meaningful.

*Compensation*

Competitive split model, negotiable with experience or an existing client base.

*Who We’re Looking For*

* Registered Massage Therapist in good standing
* Someone who genuinely cares about outcomes
* Strong communicator
* Willing to work some evenings or weekends
* Wants to be part of the Cochrane community
* Brings energy, accountability, and professionalism

Experience level is flexible. Attitude is not.

*The Bottom Line*

If you want to:

Build a busy practice
Be mentored instead of micromanaged
Work in a beautiful space
Be part of an awesome crew of women who support each other
And grow with a clinic that is clearly on the rise

We should talk.

Send your resume and tell us a bit about the kind of practice you want to build.

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Permanent, Apprenticeship

Pay: From $70.00 per hour

Expected hours: 20 – 40 per week

Work Location: In person

Arcadian Massage is local business and rapidly growing! We are excited to offer RMT positions at our *West 85th location.*

Full time position is available and our full time therapist makes $5000- $8000 monthly.

Multiple positions available looking for Wednesday to Sunday staff urgently!

* Fully furnished treatment rooms with hydraulic tables and warmers.
* Linens provided at no cost.

* 100% of tips.
* $100 every month to use for gas.

Now Hiring 2 Exceptional RMTs for Two Distinct Roles
Transform Lives & Elevate Your Profession | $45K-$100K+ Annually

Think You’re an A-Player? Start Here:
We don’t do traditional applications. Instead, we start with a short 2–3 minute Fit Survey to see if there’s alignment before moving forward.

Copy & paste into your browser:
 https://forms.office.com/r/MaY0ZXwMV4
Applications without survey completion will not be reviewed.
We review a limited number of surveys each week.

Are You Ready to Challenge the Status Quo in Massage Therapy?
At MYo Lab Health & Wellness, we're not looking for therapists who view massage as a "flexible side gig." We're seeking passionate A-Players ready to build a thriving practice and transform lives through exceptional therapeutic care.

About MYo Lab:
7+ years of excellence in Calgary.
6,000+ members served.
750+ 5-star Google reviews.
State-of-the-art 5,300 sq ft facility.
True multidisciplinary collaboration.
Proven systems for success.

Our Definition of an A-Player:
At MYo Lab, we believe A-Players are exceptional individuals who:
Take Initiative - Proactively identify and solve problems before being asked.
Have Passion - Demonstrate genuine enthusiasm for healthcare and helping others.
Are Lifetime Learners - Continuously seek knowledge and professional growth.
Maintain a Great Attitude - Bring positive energy and solutions-focused mindset.
Consistently Impress - Exceed expectations and deliver outstanding results.
Energize Others - Uplift and motivate team members and clients alike.
Go Above and Beyond - Never settle for "good enough" in pursuit of excellence.

These characteristics are non-negotiable for both our Business Builder and Care Giver roles, as they form the foundation of our exceptional team culture.

Two Distinct Career Paths We Are Hiring For:
Business Builder RMT (Higher Income Potential)

The Strategic Practice Developer Core Attributes:
Driven and competitive spirit.
Strategic mindset.
Strong empathy.
Achievement-oriented.
Laser-focused.
Business acumen.

Key Responsibilities:
Building and growing a thriving practice.
Conducting community outreach events.
Strategic practice development.
Meeting growth metrics.
Maintaining excellent clinical outcomes.
Contributing to business expansion.

Care Giver RMT:
The Relationship-Focused Healer Core Attributes:
Deep empathy.
Commitment to continuous learning.
Harmonious team player.
Relationship-focused.
Highly responsible.
Achievement-oriented.

Key Responsibilities:
Maintaining exceptional patient care standards.
Building strong, lasting client relationships.
Focus on client retention through results.
Contributing to team knowledge base.
Maintaining consistent scheduling.
Delivering outstanding therapeutic outcomes.

Why This Role is Different From Other Ads Out There:
Consistently full schedules (our RMTs are significantly busier than industry average).
Real collaboration with Chiropractors & Physiotherapists.
Clear path to advancement based on your chosen track (from above).
Professional development and mentorship programs.
Systems-based approach to practice growth.
Weekly team meetings with hands-on skill development.
Access to elite coaching and research rounds.

What Makes an A-Player RMT at MYo Lab:
Views massage therapy as a powerful healthcare intervention.
Committed to consistent hours (minimum 30 hours/week).
Thrives on measurable client outcomes.
Embraces team-based care.
Shows up 15 minutes early, ready to serve.
Implements proven systems consistently.
Passionate about professional growth.

Compensation & Growth:
Both Roles:
Starting split: 60% with performance bonuses up to 65%.
Many clinics boast high fee-splits, but we know you can't pay your expenses on a fee-split, so what you'll experience at MYo is a professional wage you can be proud of. We believe it's better to have 65% of a watermelon than a 75% of a grape ;) Our full-time RMTs range from $70K-$110K/year gross compensation.
Clear metrics for success.
Performance-based employee conversion opportunity after 90 days.

Additional Business Builder Potential:
Higher income ceiling through practice growth.
Performance-based incentives for meeting growth metrics.
Business development bonuses.

Available Hours (Choose Your Schedule):
Core Business Hours:
Sundays: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM.
Mondays: 1:00 PM - 8:00 PM.
Tuesdays & Thursdays: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM.
Wednesdays 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM.
Fridays: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM.

Team Development:
Weekly Team Meetings with hands-on skill development & role play (Mondays 1:00-2:00 PM).
Quarterly profession-focused meetings.
Research rounds.
Ongoing professional development.

Benefits:
Independent Contractor (Initial):
Flexible schedule within business hours.
On-site gym access.
Store discounts.
Performance-based incentives to reach levels only A-Players can even think of.
Company events.

Employee Benefits (Optional, After Performance Review. Or Stay as Contractor):
Comprehensive Health Spending Account.
Paid time off.
Tuition reimbursement.

Requirements:
Active RMT license.
Professional liability insurance.
Clear police check.
Commitment to minimum 30 hours/week.
Passion for healthcare excellence.
Team-oriented mindset.

Interview Process:
Initial application screening (paste this url into your browser to complete: https://forms.office.com/r/MaY0ZXwMV4)
Reference check (top 2 references required- must be in management position from a prior position you held within last 3 years).
Virtual interview with Office Manager.
Skills and personality assessment.
In-person interview with Management Team.
Offer extension.

How to Apply:
We’re serious about finding the right people — and we’ve made the process simple:
Fill out the short application form
Attach your resume and a brief cover letter answering:
Which role (Business Builder or Care Giver) fits you best and why.
When you can start.
Your preferred schedule.

Want to see who we are?
Meet MYo Lab
Our Careers Video

description.text:
Registered Massage Therapist (Independent Contractor)

*Bird’s Nest Massage | Calgary*

Bird’s Nest Massage is a growing, cozy, client-focused massage therapy practice looking to welcome another *Registered Massage Therapist (Independent Contractor)* to the nest

We’re a small business with a big heart, focused on high-quality, personalized care in a warm and welcoming environment. If you’re a motivated RMT who enjoys autonomy, flexibility, and being part of a supportive (but not micromanaging) team, keep reading.

The Role

This contractor position is ideal for someone who enjoys a balance of independence and collaboration. As a small business without a receptionist, the role includes both hands-on client care and some light day-to-day studio responsibilities.

*Responsibilities include:*

* Providing exceptional, individualized massage therapy treatments
* Checking clients in and out
* Completing direct billing when required
* Laundry (machines are located in the clinic)
* Cleaning and resetting the treatment room between clients
* Maintaining a professional, welcoming environment

_All major back-end operations — including booking systems, marketing, payments, and supplies — are handled by the business owner._

Schedule & Availability

* *2–5 days per week*
* Schedule is flexible; however:
* *Must be available for at least one evening shift per week* (ending by 8:00 pm)
* *Must be available for a minimum of 2 Saturdays per month*

These time slots reflect our highest client demand.

Compensation

* *60/40 split (contractor/business)* to start
* Once you’ve built and maintained a steady client base and demonstrated consistent professionalism and strong work ethic, *the split will be renegotiated*

Requirements

* Registered Massage Therapist in good standing with your professional association
* Valid *City of Calgary Massage Practitioner License*
* Professional, reliable, and client-focused
* Comfortable working independently and taking ownership of your space
* Strong communication and time-management skills

Why Bird’s Nest Massage?

* Supportive, small-business environment
* No receptionist, no pressure — just clear expectations and mutual respect
* Owner handles marketing, booking systems, admin, and all supplies (linens, oils, massage tools, etc.)
* Opportunity to grow with the business and renegotiate your split
* A calm, cozy space where quality care comes first

If you’re looking for a place where you can build a loyal client base, feel trusted, and be part of something growing — without the corporate clinic feel — we’d love to hear from you.

Please email withthe subject: Resume to denapaull@birdsnestmassage.com

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Permanent

Pay: From $60.00 per hour

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Job Overview*
Riverbend Physiotherapy & Neuro Rehab Clinic is seeking a passionate and motivated *Registered Massage Therapist (RMT)* to join our growing multidisciplinary team. This is a paid position where you’ll play a key role in promoting wellness, relaxation, pain relief, and recovery for a diverse patient population.

In this role, you’ll deliver personalized, evidence-based massage therapy treatments while working alongside physiotherapists and other healthcare professionals in a supportive, collaborative environment. If you’re energetic, client-focused, and committed to high-quality care, we’d love to meet you.

*Schedule Requirement:*

* Minimum *3 shifts per week* - Contract

Responsibilities

* Provide professional massage therapy treatments tailored to individual client needs
* Perform thorough patient assessments, including symptom review, medical history, and treatment goals
* Deliver treatments such as deep tissue massage, trigger point therapy, and relaxation techniques
* Educate clients on self-care strategies and recommend ongoing treatment plans
* Maintain accurate and timely treatment notes and client records
* Ensure a safe, clean, and comfortable treatment environment following clinic protocols
* Collaborate with physiotherapists and other healthcare providers as needed
* Stay current with best practices and participate in ongoing professional development

Qualifications & Experience

* Registered Massage Therapist with *valid provincial license/certification*
* *At least 1 year of experience*
* Strong knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and relevant medical terminology
* Hands-on experience with a variety of massage techniques (deep tissue, trigger point, etc.)
* Excellent client service and communication skills
* Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced clinical environment
* Experience with pain management and patient assessments preferred

Why Join Riverbend?

* Supportive, collaborative multidisciplinary team
* Consistent client flow and administrative support
* Opportunities for professional growth and long-term career development
* Positive, patient-focused work environment

Join *Riverbend Physiotherapy & Neuro Rehab Clinic* and help our clients achieve their wellness and recovery goals through skilled, compassionate care. Your expertise truly makes a difference here.

Job Type: Part-time

Work Location: In person

*Pay:* CA$60.00 - CA$90.00 per hour

Job description:

*Sunshine Physiotherapy is hiring a part time Registered Massage Therapist in Cochrane, Alberta.*

Cochrane is a vibrant community nestled between Calgary and the Rocky Mountains. We have been in the heart of Cochrane and in business since 2005.

*What We Offer:*

- Flexible work schedules.

- Wage is above industry standard with vacation and stat pay.

*Registered massage therapist (RMT) needed for busy Physiotherapy office in Cochrane. *We are looking for a full time or part-time RMT to work alongside our physiotherapists and other wellness practitioners. We require someone who is 2200+ hr certified in Alberta (able to submit to insurance) and prefers to provide therapeutic & deep tissue / sports massage.

We offer the above industry standard in compensation. Pre and Post Natal massage is a huge asset as is visceral and/or lymphatic drainage.

Please feel free to reach out to us as we would love to chat with you and discuss the opportunity to see if we can be a good fit for each other.

*Must Be:*
- Able to legally work in Canada.
- Licensed, registered (2200 hr) and in good standing with College of Massage Therapists of Alberta

-Minimum 3 years of work experience in a Massage Clinic

- No Criminal Record

Every member of our Sunshine Physiotherapy Team takes pride in serving our community, to help our patients live a healthier, pain free, and active lifestyle.

For more information regarding Sunshine Physiotherapy and the team, please visit: https://www.sunshinephysiotherapy.ca/

Licence/Certification:

* License and Registered and in good standing with the CRMTA (required)

Benefits :

* On-site free parking
* Child care centers (3) within 1 block

* On-site parking

description.text:
*Location:* Trinity Hills, SW Calgary (Right beside Winsport)

*Studio Overview:* We are a unique, integrated wellness studio offering medical aesthetics, massage therapy, and dental hygiene services! Our focus is on holistic health, collaboration between professionals, and client well-being.

*Position:* Part-Time Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) - Contractor

*Job Description:* We are seeking a dedicated and self-driven Registered Massage Therapist to join our team on a part-time basis. You will have the opportunity to build your own client base, with a strong focus on client relationships and personalized care in a gorgeous new studio!

*Responsibilities:*

* Provide exceptional massage therapy services tailored to individual client needs
* Maintain a client-focused approach, prioritizing their health and wellness
* Collaborate with dental hygienists and other team members to ensure comprehensive client care
* Maintain high quality chart notes
* Be willing to undergo or already possess TMJ training, given the close work with dental professionals and in-house referrals
* Ensure a clean and tidy workspace

*Qualifications:*

* Registered Massage Therapist with a recognized certification
* Strong clinical understanding of massage therapy treatments
* Passionate about career development and client care
* Self-motivated and capable of creating and building a loyal client base
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
* Team player attitude with a collaborative approach to health and wellness
* Willingness to refrain from accepting tips as part of our wellness mission

*Perks and Benefits:*

* Competitive compensation with schedule flexibility
* The studio provides all massage oils, linens, laundering, Jane App, receptionist services, lockers, tablets on-site, etc.
* Service-for-service exchange within the studio with our other professionals, including dental hygiene and aesthetic services
* Supportive and collaborative work environment

*Why Join Us?*

* Be part of a pioneering studio that integrates various health and wellness services
* Work in a prime new location in Trinity Hills, close to Winsport
* Enjoy the freedom to create your own schedule and grow your client base
* Thrive in a supportive environment that values holistic health and client care

*How to Apply:* If you are passionate about massage therapy and eager to join a team that prioritizes client well-being and professional growth, we would love to hear from you. Please send your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your experience and why you are the perfect fit for this role to hello@skinecht.ca

*Join us in making a difference in our clients' health and wellness journey!*

Job Type: Part-time

Pay: $45.00-$65.00 per hour



Application question(s):
* This position requires you to bring your own clients.  Do you have a client base or are you working towards building one?

description.text:
At Coven Health Collective, care is personal. We blend evidence, inclusivity, and real human compassion to support everyone who walks through our doors.
We are searching for a Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) who enjoys a varied caseload that ranges from chronic pain and orthopedic injuries to pregnancy care, postpartum recovery, high performing athletes, and stress-driven tension patterns.
Location: Coven Health Collective (Mission, Calgary, AB)Availability: Flexible FT/ PT (days, evenings, weekends)Employment Type: Contractor
Why Join Us?:
Join a high-demand, busy clinic with strong referral sources and internal collaboration
Step into a supportive, trauma-informed team with an established reputation
Collaborate with an interdisciplinary group of practitioners
Design your caseload around your scope, strengths, and passion
Flexible scheduling and autonomy in your practice
Competitive and transparent compensation
Opportunities to lead workshops, contribute to community care, and share your voice through social channels
Seasonal socials and connection with other like-minded practitioners
Yearly financial support for continuing education

Who You Are:We welcome RMT’s who:
Are excited to work within and contribute to a collaborative, interdisciplinary model
Deliver trauma-informed, therapeutic massage treatments tailored to individual recovery and wellness goals
Interested in building community relationships and working towards developing a sustainable caseload

Your Roles and Responsibilities:
Provide thorough assessments and treatment plans across your RMT scope
Collaborate closely with physiotherapists, chiropractors, occupational therapists, nurse practitioners and other allied health professionals
Actively participate in clinic-wide case discussions and interdisciplinary coordination
Lead or support education on relevant topics (if aligned with your interests)
Maintain timely, detailed charting and referral documentation in Jane App
Engage in case discussions, professional development, and outreach as desired

What We’re Looking For:Minimum Qualifications:
Active registration and good standing with a recognized Alberta massage therapy association (MTAA, NHPC, CRMTA, CMMOTA)
Current malpractice insurance
Strong technical skills in therapeutic, prenatal/postnatal and/or deep tissue massage
Some experience in clinical or wellness environments (new grads welcome!)

Bonus Points For…:
Experience in the fields related/adjacent to women’s health, gender-affirming care, perinatal care, orthopedic care and/or lymphatic techniques
Familiarity with EMRs (Jane App), Gmail, WhatsApp, and other digital tools
Interest or experience in providing trauma-informed care
Interest in advocacy, community outreach, and clinical education

What We Value: During interviews, we’ll explore how you demonstrate:
Compassion
Clinical skill
An ability to work within a collaborative environment
Communication skills
A willingness to adapt, learn, and evolve your practice
Your dedication to creating an inclusive space for all, upheld with professionalism

Ready to Apply?:Send your cover letter and resume as a single PDF, letting us know your areas of focus, your approach to care, and why Coven Health Collective feels like a good fit.
We appreciate all applications and will be in touch with those selected for interviews.

description.text:
*Registered Massage Therapist (RMT)*

*Nuad Thai Massage – Calgary, AB*

*About the Position*

Nuad Thai Massage is looking for a friendly and dedicated *Registered Massage Therapist* to join our clinic in Calgary. We are a fast-growing team that values professionalism, compassion, and a genuine desire to help clients feel their best.
This role is ideal for therapists who want flexible hours, steady bookings, and a supportive work atmosphere. Training for Traditional Thai Massage is available for those interested in expanding their skills.

*What You’ll Do*

* Provide therapeutic massage sessions tailored to each client’s needs
* Offer Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and herbal compress treatments
* Review client health information and adjust treatments safely
* Maintain clean and fully prepared treatment spaces throughout the day
* Document session notes and protect client privacy
* Communicate clearly and kindly with clients before and after services
* Contribute to a calm and teamwork-oriented clinic environment
* Optional: Learn Traditional Thai Massage through our in-house training

*What We’re Looking For*

* A Registered Massage Therapist with *2200 hours of approved training* (recognized by insurance)
* Someone who demonstrates strong therapeutic technique and client care
* Previous clinic or wellness experience preferred but not required
* Excellent communication skills and a professional attitude
* Reliable, organized, and comfortable working independently
* Willing to work evenings or weekends based on clinic needs
* Interest in Traditional Thai Massage is a bonus

*Why Work With Us*

* Competitive pay structure
* Friendly and supportive team culture
* Opportunities to learn new modalities
* Consistent clients and a welcoming environment

*Apply Today*

If you’re a committed RMT who enjoys helping clients feel better, we’d love to meet you.

*Join our team and grow with us at Nuad Thai Massage.*

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Casual

Expected hours: No less than 24 per week

Benefits:
* Company events
* Extended health care
* Flexible schedule
* On-site parking
* Store discount

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Join Our Talented Team at Aquila Therapeutic Clinic*

Many RMTs feel like they’re left to figure everything out on their own, without real guidance to grow. At *Aquila Therapeutic Massage*, you’ll be supported by a top-performing Calgary RMT known for strong client retention results.

If you've been part of a team that relies mostly on word of mouth. We take consistent steps to support coachable RMTs in growing their clientele.

We welcome both *new graduates* *& experienced RMTs *who are seeking hands-on mentorship, and a clear path to building a strong, sustainable career.

https://aquilatherapy.com/

*What You’ll Do*

* Deliver customized therapeutic and relaxation-focused massage treatments tailored to individual client needs
* Conduct consultations and assessments to determine appropriate treatment plans
* Provide a mindful, professional, and consistent experience for every client
* Maintain accurate treatment notes and client progression records
* Ensure treatment rooms remain clean, organized, and prepared for service

*What We’re Looking For*

* Minimum 2200-hour massage therapy certification
* Active registration with a recognized Alberta massage association
* Valid liability insurance (current and maintained throughout employment)
* Up-to-date CPR certification
* City of Calgary business licence
* Coachable, eager to learn, and willing to follow proven systems and standards
* Comfortable providing both therapeutic and relaxation-style treatments

*Why Join Us*

* Competitive compensation
* Flexible scheduling to support work-life balance
* Supportive leadership focused on development, growth, and long-term success
* A culture built on respect, collaboration, and high standards
* Staff discounts and staff massage on wellness services
* Complimentary wellness treatments for team members
* Health benefits available for committed full-time therapists

*Work Location*

* In person at Aquila Therapeutic Clinic, Calgary South
* Specific scheduling and hours will be determined based on the successful candidate’s background and availability

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Fixed term contract, Internship / Co-op

Pay: $65.00 per hour

Work Location: In person
